ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Customer reports slow internet for 3 days in mixed Chinese-English conversation. Node congestion identified, technician visit scheduled for Thursday.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: 我的网络一直很慢。
Agent: I understand you're experiencing slow speeds. Let me run a diagnostic.
Customer: 已经三天了，我需要上网工作。
Agent: I see there's congestion on your node. I can schedule a technician visit.
Customer: 什么时候能修好？
Agent: We can have someone there by Thursday.
